title: treasury / genius act / stablecoin | Regulatory Guidance | Treasury Seeks Public Comment on GENIUS Act Notice of Propos...
summary: The U.S. Department of the Treasury issued a Notice of Proposed Rulemaking (NPRM) to establish principles for determining whether state-level stablecoin regulatory regimes are substantially similar to the federal framework under the GENIUS Act. Issuers with up to $10 billion in consolidated outstanding issuance may opt for state-level regulation if their state regime meets the substantially similar standard. This is Treasury's first proposed regulation to implement the GENIUS Act.
